required_models.role: LFM2.5-350M base model used by shared understanding and bounded verbalization
Shared understanding adapter for the single-forward 9-head classifier runtime
Bounded dialogue-repair verbalizer for selected follow-up and repair acts
Tool-support adapter for ambiguous local action paths

required_resources.role: Canonical RAG corpus consumed by BM25HierarchyRetriever and DeterministicAnswerComposer
Canonical source-chip and in-app destination links
Label schema for the shared understanding classifier heads
Nine classifier head triplets for support intent, issue complexity, routing lane, cloud requirements, required tool, escalation risk, PII risk, transcript quality, and slot completeness

online_qa_runtime.policy_owner: Swift route policy; verbalizer cannot choose tools, citations, routes, or handoffs
